display_name: AlgoSec Diagnostic Framework Successor Template Pack

planning_summary.project_goal: Create a bounded agent-centered ADF successor template that learns from incomplete technical documentation plus live Rocky 8 appliance discovery, builds machine-readable diagnostic content first, and proves value through an early shallow surface map slice before deeper dependency or predictive work.
planning_summary.new_template_rationale: The current ADF line already contains valuable artifacts and lessons, but the successor should start cleanly with the newer agent-native, bounded-slice, early-proof operating model rather than retrofitting the active implementation line in place.
planning_summary.initial_benchmark_intent: Confirm the fresh successor template remains PackFactory-valid and can materialize a first proving-ground build-pack without broadening the testing surface.
expected_build_pack_variants: later dependency-map and support-playbook derivation build-pack
planning_summary.first_materialization_purpose: Materialize the first bounded successor build-pack for the shallow surface map slice against the Rocky 8 and appliance runtime.

agent_native_project_profile_selection.selection_reason: The ADF successor line is intentionally agent-centered from initialization and should inherit the tracker-backed objective, backlog, work-state, and restart-memory model by default.

personality_template_selection.selection_reason: The successor line should communicate in plain, concise, operator-facing language suitable for frontline support and bounded technical review.

notes: The first-wave role/domain lens is the line-specific `diagnostic-systems-analyst`, but current request schemas only accept catalog role/domain entries. Apply that lens as a pack-local line contract immediately after creation/materialization unless it is first promoted into the shared catalog.

Wave 1 is explicitly limited to the shallow surface map slice: one machine-readable map and one operator-reviewable summary derived from live runtime observation plus incomplete but agent-optimized technical documentation.
Do not encode predictive analytics, broad publication work, or deep dependency interpretation into the first successor template request.
